data.body: Investigation (INTERMEDIATE, opus): Ticket premise is incorrect — production dso-setup.sh DOES read $2 as PLUGIN_ROOT at line 102. create-dso-app.sh:439 correctly passes resolved_plugin_root. The test STUB at tests/scripts/test-create-dso-app.sh:1110-1120 ignores $2, which is an acceptable test-double pattern (stub only needs to simulate shim creation). A legitimate coverage gap exists: no test asserts create-dso-app.sh passes plugin_root as arg2. ESCALATE: user decision needed — (a) close as not-a-bug, (b) strengthen test stub to record arg2 and add assertion.
